name: @aperture-engine/workspace
description: WebGPU-only, ECS-native 3D runtime where simulation is authoritative and rendering is a derived view.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/simulation packages/render packages/runtime packages/core packages/webgpu
scripts.check:examples: node --check scripts/serve-examples.mjs && node --check examples/main.js && node --check examples/triangle.js && node --check examples/multi-entity.js && node --check examples/spinning-cube.js && node --check examples/instancing.js && node --check examples/batching.js && node --check examples/render-to-texture.js && node --check examples/worker-cube.main.js && node --check examples/worker-cube.worker.js && node --check examples/matcap-app.js && node --check examples/materials-showcase.js && node --check examples/gltf-scene.js && node --check examples/point-shadow.js && node --check examples/spot-shadow.js && node --check examples/multi-light-shadow.js && node --check examples/glb-viewer.js && node --check examples/standard-texture-control.js && node --check examples/standard-gltf-texture.js && node --check examples/app-diagnostics.js && node --check examples/standard-queue-phases.js && node --check examples/depth-app-overlap.js && node --check examples/webgpu-readback.js
scripts.check: pnpm run check:boundaries && pnpm run check:progress && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:test && pnpm run check:examples && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm test
